name: agnular-webcomponent-routing
description: Minimal stand: Angular host delegates a routing subtree to a web component that runs its own client-side router built on the Navigation API + URLPattern.

scripts.build:libs: bun run build:router && bun run build:wc
scripts.dev:libs: bun run --filter @igor-ganov/subtree-router dev & bun run --filter @igor-ganov/feature-web-component dev
scripts.start: bun run build:libs && bun run --cwd host-app start
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @igor-ganov/subtree-router typecheck && bun run --filter @igor-ganov/feature-web-component typecheck
